docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GABATAN, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
